title: Domain Profile
description: Schema for a domain.yaml profile that configures entity types, relations, extraction thresholds, scoring weights, and prompt paths for a specific domain.

name.description: Human-readable domain name (e.g., 'AI and Machine Learning')

slug.description: Short identifier used in paths and CLI flags (e.g., 'ai')

description.description: One-line description of the domain scope

entity_types.description: Enum of entity node types. PascalCase. Order determines display priority.

groups.description: Optional grouping of relations by category for documentation/UI. Keys are group names, values are arrays of canonical relation names.

normalization.description: Map of LLM output variations to canonical relation names. Keys are non-canonical strings, values are canonical relation names.

relation_kinds.description: Valid relation kind labels. Default: asserted, inferred, hypothesis.

id_prefixes.description: Map of entity type name to canonical ID prefix. Every entity_type must have an entry. Prefix is lowercase, used as '{prefix}:{slug}'.

base_relation.description: The base/default relation type used for mention counting and as the base layer in graph views (e.g., 'MENTIONS').

views.description: Graph view definitions. Keys are view slugs, values configure which relations are included.

relations.description: List of canonical relation types included in this view. Empty array means 'all relations'.

evidence_coverage_min.description: Minimum fraction of entities with evidence snippets

relation_entity_ratio_target.description: Target ratio of relations to entities

tech_terms_min.description: Minimum number of technology/domain terms expected

relation_type_diversity_target.description: Target number of distinct relation types per extraction

evidence_fidelity_min.description: Minimum evidence fidelity score (snippet must appear in source text)

orphan_max.description: Maximum fraction of orphan relation endpoints (0.0 = zero tolerance)

zero_value_min_doc_chars.description: Documents shorter than this are exempt from zero-value gate

high_confidence_threshold.description: Confidence level above which bad evidence triggers immediate escalation

escalation_threshold.description: Overall quality score below which extraction is escalated to a stronger model

scoring_weights.description: Weights for quality scoring components. Should sum to 1.0.

velocity_cap.description: Cap for velocity ratio before normalization

activity_cap.description: Cap for 7-day mention count before normalization

max_age_days.description: Maximum age in days for novelty scoring

novelty_age_weight.description: Weight of age component in novelty score

novelty_rarity_weight.description: Weight of rarity component in novelty score

trend_weights.description: Weights for trend scoring. velocity + novelty + activity should sum to 1.0.

suppressed_entities.description: Entity names that are too generic for the domain and should be suppressed during extraction. Case-insensitive matching.

dir.description: Relative path (from domain root) to the prompts directory containing extraction prompt templates

system_prompt.description: Filename for extraction system prompt within the prompts dir

user_prompt.description: Filename for extraction user prompt template within the prompts dir
